integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Snipe-IT graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web application, clicking buttons, and filling out forms, rather than executing SQL queries or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent genuinely entered the required data into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting text into the appropriate input fields (e.g., notes, user details, location addresses) within the Snipe-IT interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show a logical sequence of page loads, form submissions, and success flash messages native to Snipe-IT, without the browser's 'Inspect Element' panel being used to alter the DOM.
